# Sipurai (סיפוראי)

> Sipurai is an AI-powered platform for creating, sharing, and printing
> personalized children's books. A child or parent chooses characters, art
> style, language (Hebrew, English, or Yiddish), and genre — and the AI writes
> a complete illustrated story. Hebrew-first with full RTL support.

Sipurai turns a few choices into a finished, illustrated, child-safe book. The
creation flow generates the story text and the illustrations, keeps characters
consistent across pages, and supports reading the result aloud with natural
text-to-speech. Finished books can be shared to a community gallery, read
online, exported, and printed on demand.

## Key features

- AI story generation tailored to the child's age, language, and chosen genre
- AI illustration generation with cross-page character consistency
- Multilingual: Hebrew, English, Yiddish — all with right-to-left support
- Text-to-speech narration (natural cloud voices)
- Community gallery for sharing and discovering public books
- Gamification: XP, levels, badges, and streaks
- Print-on-demand export to physical books

## Pages

- Home: https://www.sipurai.ai/ — dashboard, featured books, daily prompt
- Create a book: https://www.sipurai.ai/CreativeStoryStudio — main creation flow
- Community: https://www.sipurai.ai/Community — shared public books
- Library: https://www.sipurai.ai/Library — your saved books
- Story ideas: https://www.sipurai.ai/StoryIdeas — AI idea generator

## Safety

All generated content is intended to be age-appropriate and child-safe. No
scary or violent content. Child information entered during book creation is
private to the account that created it and is not publicly readable.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.sipurai.ai
- Analytics (internal): https://analytics.sipurai.ai
